codes.BACKEND_UNAVAILABLE: We could not connect 到 server right now. Please try again shortly.
codes.BACKEND_ENDPOINT_NOT_FOUND: Backend API endpoint was not found. domain is reachable, but API route is not deployed.

codes.SESSION_EXPIRED: Your session expired. 登录 again 到 继续.

privacy.title: 隐私

privacy.optionalAI: If 在线 AI features are enabled, those requests may be sent 到 configured services.

about.title: 关于
about.prototypeScope: This is a prototype 用于 reference 和 training. 无t 用于 clinical use.

safety.title: Clinical safety
safety.body: AI Vent provides documentation support 和 advisory safety prompts only. It does not replace clinical judgment, issue treatment orders, 或 determine 呼吸机 设置.
safety.secondary: Confirm all decisions against 患者, your 机构 workflow, 和 local clinical protocol.
safety.acknowledgeLabel: I understand this is advisory decision support only
safety.acknowledgeHint: 必填 before continuing 到 clinical workflows
safety.syncDeferred: Safety acknowledgement is saved on this device 和 will be 已同步 when backend authentication is available.

clinicalSafety.title: Use as advisory support
clinicalSafety.body: 审核 safety note before using AI Vent. app can highlight missing data 和 uncertainty, but a qualified clinician remains responsible 用于 患者 care decisions.

facilityWorkflow.title: Stay in 机构 context
facilityWorkflow.body: Use active 机构 和 角色 shown by your session. Keep records within correct 机构 workflow 和 follow local escalation, 审核, 和 approval procedures.

inputs.title: 输入ing inputs
inputs.body: Use 收治 到 输入 available clinical parameters (SpO2, PaO2, PaCO2, pH, respiratory rate, etc.). 可选 ABG values improve confidence when available, but missing 可选 data should be reviewed as uncertainty rather than treated as a 保存 blocker.

recommendations.title: Interpreting recommendations
recommendations.body: Recommendations 显示 advisory 呼吸机 setting references 带 a confidence tier. Match quality reflects how well dataset cases align 带 your inputs. Use matched cases as reference only 和 verify against clinical judgment.

monitoring.title: 监测 和 alerts
monitoring.body: After reviewing a 建议, use 监测 到 log vitals 和 labs over time. Alerts highlight values outside set thresholds 和 should be assessed according 到 local protocol.

offline.title: 离线 behavior
offline.body: Core workflow (收治, advisory summaries, 监测) works 离线. Data is saved locally. 可选 AI features require connectivity. When 返回 在线, 继续 as 正常.

sections.guides: What 到 do 下一步

glossary.PEEP: Positive end-expiratory pressure (cmH₂O). Maintains lung volume 和 oxygenation.
glossary.FiO2: Fraction of inspired oxygen (0–1). Percentage of oxygen in inspired gas.
glossary.IERatio: I:E ratio. Inspiratory 到 expiratory time ratio (e.g. 1:2).
glossary.tidalVolume: 潮气量 (mL). Volume delivered per breath.
glossary.PaCO2: Partial pressure of arterial carbon dioxide (mmHg).
glossary.ABG: Arterial blood gas values such as PaO2, PaCO2, 和 pH, tied 到 a sample time.
glossary.referenceStatus: Governance 和 verification state 用于 a reference range. Only active approved 或 verified ranges are eligible 用于 active decision-support display.
glossary.datasetCapture: Candidate de-identified records that need 审核 before dataset 或 training use.
glossary.reviewQueue: A work queue 用于 审核 decisions, corrections, exclusions, 和 audit reasons.
glossary.syncState: Current 离线, 在线, 或 syncing state. Clinical records may still need later sync.
glossary.shadowMode: Governed model evaluation mode where outputs remain hidden 从 正常 clinical workflows.

missingABG.title: Missing ABG values
missingABG.body: Recommendations work without ABG; 输入 SpO₂ 和 其他 vitals when available. 用于 better matching, 添加 PaO₂, PaCO₂, 和 pH when you have them.

offline.title: Using app 离线
offline.body: 收治, advisory summaries, 和 监测 work 离线. Data is stored locally. 可选 AI suggestions require internet. Sync is not 必填 用于 core workflow.

unverifiedReference.title: Reference range is not active
unverifiedReference.body: Draft, 待处理, retired, rejected, 和 unverified ranges are not eligible 用于 active decision-support display. 审核 source, version, scope, 和 verification status.

roleRestrictedModelHelp.title: Model-readiness 帮助 is restricted
roleRestrictedModelHelp.body: Predictive model readiness 和 shadow-mode details are visible only 到 approved governance roles. 无rmal clinical workflows do not expose model internals.

needsReview.title: Record needs 审核
needsReview.body: Use 审核 queue 到 check submitted data, request correction, 批准 eligible records, 或 排除 records 带 an audit 原因.

guides.home: 审核 机构 context, sync state, active admissions, red flags, 和 records needing 审核 before opening a 患者 workflow.
guides.admit: Capture 患者 pathway 和 available clinical values. Mark unavailable data clearly 和 审核 backend-confirmed calculations after 保存.
guides.tracking: Use 跟踪 到 scan recent ventilation status 和 审核 needs. Read trend flags 带 source data 和 local protocol context.
guides.abgVentUpdate: Add new ABG results and ventilator settings as time-stamped records so earlier values remain available for review.
guides.datasetCapture: Use dataset capture 用于 de-identified candidate records. Human 审核 is 必填 before approved training-data use.
guides.reviewQueue: Use 审核 queue 到 批准, request correction, 或 排除 records while preserving audit trail.
guides.dashboard: Use dashboards 用于 aggregate quality, 审核, reference, 和 governance status. Avoid 患者 identifiers in governance summaries.
guides.settings: Use 设置 用于 账户, 机构, accessibility, 隐私, sync, 和 reference visibility preferences where authorized.
guides.hypoxemia: 审核 FiO₂ 和 PEEP; consider recruitment; check 用于 shunt 或 V/Q mismatch.
guides.hypercapnia: 审核 minute ventilation (rate × tidal volume); consider permissive hypercapnia per protocol.
guides.acidosis: Address ventilation 和 perfusion; correct underlying cause per protocol.
guides.general: Use recommendations as decision support only. Validate against local protocols 和 clinical judgment.
